textByHash.8cdfc7a6a8fc0a00571a426e5ef81afaebbfd8c3: I'm cooking pizzas for the people in this camp.
textByHash.fa570dde914266a061ef59531cc495f93caa8989: Not that these louts appreciate my gourmet cooking!
textByHash.82e07f9e1f4ef6d95af9e6ef73694ce90fd59c08: Well I'm an outlaw. I was accused of giving the king food poisoning! The thought of it! I think he just drank too much wine that night.
textByHash.b3c2d3668316d0a767b8515c67599340500f207a: I had to flee the kingdom of Misthalin! The bandits give me refuge here as long as I cook for them.
textByHash.cb11a45dc33d89027e8b426b863c01031957f8fe: Well this pizza is really meant to be for the bandits. I guess I could sell you some pizza bases though
textByHash.7c91d3c2b497954f9b375abfb4e23e81fd681b38: Well I guess I can sell you some half made pizzas.
